description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge display dominating the front, featuring a vibrant, colorful screen with a fingerprint icon and digital clock interface. The back is sleek and matte black, displaying the OnePlus logo in the center and a triple camera array in the top left corner. The device is slim, with minimal bezels and rounded corners, giving it a contemporary and premium appearance. The sides are thin, with visible buttons and a subtle metallic sheen. The phone's construction appears to combine glass and metal, with a smooth, glossy finish on the front and a matte finish on the back. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible case or external accessories.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a vibrant edge-to-edge display, matte black back, and triple rear cameras. Features a minimalist design with visible side buttons and OnePlus branding.
description_view_0: A side profile view showing the phone's slimness and the placement of side buttons.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the large, colorful display with a fingerprint icon and digital clock interface.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile, again emphasizing the thinness and button placement.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the matte black finish, OnePlus logo, and triple camera array in the top left corner.
attribute_brand_logo: A white OnePlus logo is centered on the back of the phone, with the word 'ONEPLUS' in small text near the bottom.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper, a digital clock reading '10:00 TUESDAY, MAY', and a fingerprint icon near the bottom center, indicating an in-display fingerprint sensor.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back, arranged vertically with a small flash below the cameras.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both the left and right edges; likely a power button and volume rocker, with slim, elongated shapes.
